message:
fix(ssr): add browser API guards and hydration safety checks

Add defensive checks across multiple components to handle SSR edge cases
and environments where certain browser APIs may not be available:

- site-footer.tsx: Add suppressHydrationWarning to copyright year to
  prevent hydration mismatch when server/client dates differ

- table-of-contents.tsx: Guard IntersectionObserver usage, initialize
  activeId to first heading to prevent undefined state, resolve activeId
  against available headings to handle stale state

- animated-grid.tsx (LazySection): Guard IntersectionObserver to prevent
  crashes in environments that don't support it

- x-stats-card.tsx: Guard IntersectionObserver, add hover capability
  detection via matchMedia("(hover: hover)") to properly handle
  touch-only devices, use setTimeout for hydration-safe visibility init

- typing-animation.tsx: Handle empty words array gracefully with early
  return, fix loop termination to stop at last word when loop=false

- notable-stargazers.tsx: Add fallback chain for totalCount using
  totalCount ?? notableCount ?? 0 to handle missing data

These changes improve resilience across different browsers, SSR
frameworks, and device capabilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
